question: Read out the short title of icd9 code 01166.
prompt_sent: Read out the short title of icd9 code 01166. Set the current time to be "2100-12-31 23:59:00" when using m3 mcp.
final_text:
**ICD‑9 code 01166 – Short Title**

> **Tuberculous pneumonia**

*(The full description in MIMIC‑IV is “tuberculous pneumonia [any form], tubercle bacilli not found by bacteriological or histological examination, but tuberculosis confirmed by other methods [inoculation of animals]”. The concise short title used for clinical coding and reporting is “Tuberculous pneumonia.”)*
